body: 'gittoc update T-42 --state open' on a ticket currently in state=claimed preserves the owner field (tracker.update_issue keeps owner unless --owner is explicitly passed). A ticket that is open but still carries a previous owner is misleading for 'unblocked' and 'resume' selection, and 'gittoc list' still reports 'owner=...' on an unclaimed ticket. When a transition goes claimed → open (or claimed → blocked without explicit owner), the owner should auto-clear unless --owner is explicitly provided. A corresponding event kind ('unclaimed' or a 'claimed' event with empty text) keeps the audit trail visible.
title: unclaiming (state->open) should clear owner
